title: Inspect, test and service batteries
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect, test and service batteries demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to inspect, test and service battery

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for inspect and servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for inspect and servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for inspect and servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to inspect, test and service battery

elements.title: Inspect and test battery

pcs.text: Carry out inspection and testing of battery systems according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Carry out inspection and testing of battery circuits according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.3 Compare inspection results against manufacturer specifications2.4 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out inspection and testing of battery systems according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Carry out inspection and testing of battery circuits according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.3 Compare inspection results against manufacturer specifications2.4 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out inspection and testing of battery systems according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Carry out inspection and testing of battery circuits according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.3 Compare inspection results against manufacturer specifications2.4 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect and test battery

elements.title: Service and maintain battery

pcs.text: Service and maintain battery according to manufacturer and battery specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to manufacturer specifications workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Service and maintain battery according to manufacturer and battery specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to manufacturer specifications workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Service and maintain battery according to manufacturer and battery specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to manufacturer specifications workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Service and maintain battery

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
